nodes.name: Bangsia
nodes.summary: Bangsia（Bangsia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Black-and-gold tanager、Golden-chested tanager、Moss-backed tanager等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-and-gold tanager
nodes.summary: The black-and-gold tanager (Bangsia melanochlamys) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae, which is endemic to Colombia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
